name: completion_date_present
expression: completion_date IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(completion_date)) > 0
description: completion_date is required for Well Completion Report extraction.

name: well_name_present
expression: well_name IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(well_name)) > 0
description: well_name is required for Well Completion Report extraction.

name: api_well_number_present
expression: api_well_number IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(api_well_number)) > 0
description: api_well_number is required for Well Completion Report extraction.

name: operator_name_present
expression: operator_name IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(operator_name)) > 0
description: operator_name is required for Well Completion Report extraction.

name: completion_type_present
expression: completion_type IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(completion_type)) > 0
description: completion_type is required for Well Completion Report extraction.

name: total_depth_non_negative
description: total_depth should be non-negative when present.

name: proppant_volume_non_negative
description: proppant_volume should be non-negative when present.

name: fluid_volume_non_negative
description: fluid_volume should be non-negative when present.

name: initial_oil_rate_bpd_non_negative
description: initial_oil_rate_bpd should be non-negative when present.

name: initial_gas_rate_mcfpd_non_negative
description: initial_gas_rate_mcfpd should be non-negative when present.
